description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this shoel from catwalk is crafted with high quality material to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche. Heel: 3" Upper Suede upper with a covered toe and stitch detailing for enhanced durability and style Ajustable buckle design across the midfoot for enhanced comfort Slip on style for ease of wear Ergonomically curved and padded synthetic leather footbed with a fabric lining Outsole TPU outsole with a grooved forefoot and heel patch for grip Brand bage on the lateral side shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
